code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an artist into a fluent natural‑language description.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple template mapping for common predicates
    templates = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}.",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}.",
        "origin": lambda s, o: f"{s} originates from {o}.",
        "genre": lambda s, o: f"{s} performs {o} music.",
        "instrument": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays the {o}.",
        "occupation": lambda s, o: f"{s} works as {o}.",
        "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": lambda s, o: f"{s} is associated with {o}.",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started their active years in {o}.",
        "activeYearsEndYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} ended their active years in {o}.",
        "recordLabel": lambda s, o: f"{s} is signed to {o}.",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o}.",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {o}.",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}.",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}.",
        "background": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s background is {o}.",
        "professionalField": lambda s, o: f"{s} works in the field of {o}.",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}.",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}.",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {o}.",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}.",
        "populationDensity": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a population density of {o}.",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} covers an area of {o} square kilometres.",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda s, o: f"{s} lies at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level.",
        "postalCode": lambda s, o: f"The postal code of {s} is {o}.",
        # Add more as needed
    }

    sentences = []
    for triple in triples:
        subj = triple.subject
        pred = triple.predicate
        obj = triple.object
        # Use the template if available, otherwise a generic fallback
        sentence = templates.get(pred, lambda s, o: f"{s} {pred} {o}")(subj, obj)
        sentences.append(sentence.rstrip('.'))

    # Join all parts into a single coherent sentence
    # Use commas and a final conjunction for readability
    if len(sentences) == 1:
        return sentences[0] + "."
    else:
        return ", ".join(sentences[:-1]) + ", and " + sentences[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
